name: Il Pesto
recipeInstructions:
1. Sauté the liver in the butter until cooked through. Remove from the pan and chop coarsely.
2. In a blender or food processor, combine the basil, garlic, walnuts, chives, cheese, salt, pepper, and 1/4 cup olive oil. Blend at low speed until smooth.
3. Slowly add the remaining olive oil, blending at low speed until all the oil is incorporated and the mixture has a whipped cream consistency.
4. Add the chopped liver and blend for an additional 5 seconds only, ensuring the liver remains discernible in texture.
5. Serve as a spread for crackers or as a sauce for spaghetti. If using as a sauce for spaghetti, increase the olive oil to 1-1/2 cups.
